description: Default capability set for vault-tauri Phase 4b — 5 Tauri commands per BRD §5.11 + dialog plugin for ADR-020 fatal-error dialogs. Permission identifiers follow Tauri 2.5+ auto-generation convention `<crate-name>:allow-<kebab-name>`. Runtime-confirm at first cargo build per Phase 4b v2 clarification 3.
